Game.Name: Arkanoid - Doh It Again (Europe)
Game.plot: Gameplay: and MechanicsYou play with a ship as your paddle. Rounds are completed when all the colour and silver blocks on the screen have been eliminated. Enemys enter from the doors at the top of the play area. Every ten rounds a boss enemy will have to be fought. Some of the blocks contain power-ups that you must catch with your paddle to use. BlocksColours: one hit.Silver: takes three hits.Gold: can not be destroyed. Power-upsSkip RoundExtra lifeMulti ball creates eight extra balls.Double length paddleCatch and release ballShoot out blocks with lasers from your paddleBall destroys all blocks in path Force field allowing for one missed ball Paddle back to normal Some of the power-ups can be used together.
Game.Notes: Arkanoid, one of the best-selling, most loved video games in history is back with more challenges and special features than ever before! In your scout ship, you will be racing through a galaxy crowded with solar block and powerful enemies, clearing the path with laser beams and energy balls. Test your reflexes in 99 levels of twisting puzzles, or use EDIT to build your own course. 9 types of power capsules drop from shattered blocks, changing the capabilities of your scout ship. Arkanoid for the Super NES is even compatible with the Super NES Mouse to enhance your maneuvering skills. Two people can play together in one of three simultaneous game modes. Arkanoid has finally made its long-awaited return and will push you to the outer limits!
